subcodes.first_line: O thou my beloved sister! Through the encircling graces of the Blessed Perfection - may my life be a ransom to the dust of His Holy Threshold - we have crossed the blue seas
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @service to others; to the Cause of God
